notes: Examples could include OpenAI, Anthropic, GLM/Z.ai, or another provider, but none is selected by this design.
Exact model/version must be approved before any real call.
Recommended tiny pilot is 36 calls; user can approve fewer/more explicitly.
Cost must be approved after current provider pricing is checked.
No key or .env is created or committed by this task.
Future runner must not write raw prompt instances.
Future runner must not write raw model responses.
Future runner must not write JSONL raw dumps.
Future execution requires a clear explicit approval phrase after model/cost/call-count are shown.
